  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    CharMarshaller
    A subclass of Marshaller for character-based serializers and parsers.
    Marshaller
    Top-level class for a pairing of a Serializer and Parser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    StreamMarshaller
    A subclass of Marshaller for stream-based serializers and parsers.

    Class
    Description
    Bson
    A pairing of a BsonSerializer and BsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Cbor
    A pairing of a CborSerializer and CborParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    CharMarshaller
    A subclass of Marshaller for character-based serializers and parsers.
    Csv
    A pairing of a CsvSerializer and CsvParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Hjson
    A pairing of a HjsonSerializer and HjsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.

    A pairing of a HoconSerializer and HoconParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Html
    A pairing of a HtmlSerializer and HtmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Ini
    A pairing of an IniSerializer and IniParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Jcs
    A pairing of a JcsSerializer and JsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Json
    A pairing of a JsonSerializer and JsonParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    Json5
    A pairing of a Json5Serializer and Json5Parser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    Json5l
    Pairs Json5lSerializer and Json5lParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Jsonl
    Pairs JsonlSerializer and JsonlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Markdown
    A pairing of a MarkdownSerializer and MarkdownParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    MarkdownDoc
    A pairing of a MarkdownDocSerializer and MarkdownDocParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods for document-mode Markdown (headings + tables).
    Marshaller
    Top-level class for a pairing of a Serializer and Parser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    MsgPack
    A pairing of a MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    OpenApi
    A pairing of a OpenApiSerializer and OpenApiParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Parquet
    A pairing of ParquetSerializer and ParquetParser for Apache Parquet binary format.
    PlainText
    A pairing of a PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Protobuf
    A pairing of a ProtobufSerializer and ProtobufParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
    Prototext
    A pairing of a PrototextSerializer and PrototextParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Sse
    Pairs SseSerializer and SseParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods for the text/event-stream wire format.
    StreamMarshaller
    A subclass of Marshaller for stream-based serializers and parsers.
    Toml
    TOML marshaller combining TomlSerializer and TomlParser.
    Uon
    A pairing of a UonSerializer and UonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    UrlEncoding
    A pairing of a UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Xml
    A pairing of a XmlSerializer and XmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Yaml
    A pairing of a YamlSerializer and YamlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
